failures.description: The agent misinterpreted or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch output and synthesized an incorrect answer: it claimed 11 options and a fake record instead of using the 4 returned matching items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The correct tool call was made and returned 4 matching items. At index 4, the Executor had the relevant tool output available but produced an answer saying there were 11 options and referenced record 0000000000, which directly contradicts the tool result and invents unsupported details. The later Evaluator did not correct this; it approved despite citing the 4-item result.
